aiGuidance.extraction: Look for explicit ownership statements: X owns this, this sits with the coordination lead, or an implicit assignment when a role is described as responsible. May be a person name or a role title.
aiGuidance.purpose: Identifies the person or role who holds accountability for this decision — who can revisit it, who is responsible for its implementation.

description: Person, role, group, or function responsible for stewardship of this record.
instructions: Name the person or role who holds this decision — who is accountable for carrying it out and who can revisit it. A role title (“Coordination lead”) is often more durable than a person’s name, since it survives people coming and going.
name: owner
